## edu-cli class assign-teacher

Assign a teacher to a class (班级指定教师)

```
edu-cli class assign-teacher [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --class-id uint     Class ID (required)
  -h, --help              help for assign-teacher
      --teacher-id uint   Teacher user ID (required)
```
